title: Optimism Local Review Candidate Filter v1

highest_priority_allowed_routes.why: Best local-only fit: source mapping, invariant analysis, duplicate comparison, and PoC planning can happen without target interaction.
Only after an individual asset clears scope, duplicate, quality, and no-side-effect gates.

default_hard_stops: Alt-DA feature claims unless exclusion is cleared
bridge/token foot-gun claims without a new protocol bypass
web/app browser work without route gate
next_action: Select exactly one Optimism smart-contract asset and create a local candidate packet; do not run code, fork chains, test targets, or submit reports.
